title: Educational Psychologist Services for Schools & LAs | Psychology Direct
description: Fast, reliable access to HCPC-registered Educational Psychologists. EHCP assessments, SEND support, and consultancy for schools, MATs and LAs.

blocks.headline: Get Educational Psychologists When You Need Them
blocks.subtitle: Your schools and settings need expert support fast. We connect you with HCPC-registered EPs for statutory assessments, SEND support, and training. No long waits. Nationwide coverage, flexible agreements, real outcomes.

blocks.heading: What Our Educational Psychologists Provide
blocks.subheading: One service, multiple needs. School, local authority, trust, or higher education provider — we have the right support.

cards.title: Schools & Academies
cards.description: Fast access to vetted EPs without long-term contracts. Flexible packages, assessments within days, practical recommendations you can use immediately.

cards.title: Local Authorities
cards.description: Clear your EHCP backlog. Statutory-compliant assessments, volume capacity, and dedicated Client Managers who understand LA timelines. No long-term lock-in.

cards.title: Multi-Academy Trusts
cards.description: Consistent EP support across your trust. We coordinate across schools, allocate dedicated EPs, and offer volume pricing with centralised administration.

cards.title: Higher Education
cards.description: DSA assessments, access arrangements for exams, and mental health evaluations. Quick turnaround when your students need it most.

cards.title: EHCP Assessments
cards.description: Expert support through the statutory EHCP pathway. Compliant reports, clear recommendations, fast delivery, even for complex cases.

cards.title: Specialist Assessments
cards.description: Autism, dyslexia, ADHD, and specific learning assessments. Evidence-based evaluation and practical guidance schools can act on.

blocks.heading: How Psychology Direct Works for Education

steps.title: Get in Touch
steps.description: Tell us what you need and your timeline. Your dedicated Client Manager listens and understands your challenge.

steps.title: Receive Expert Matches
steps.description: Within 48 hours, we send you CVs and fixed quotes. The EP is matched to your assessment type and location.

steps.title: We Manage the Logistics
steps.description: Once you've chosen your EP, we handle administration, scheduling, and coordination. You focus on the child.

steps.title: Quality Report Delivered
steps.description: You receive a report that's 100% quality-checked. Practical recommendations, clear language, delivered on time.

blocks.heading: What We Offer for Your Needs

children.text: We specialise in Education, Health and Care Plan assessments. Our EPs understand statutory timelines and deliver reports that meet all legal requirements.
Complete EHCP assessments within the 16-week window
Provide evidence-based recommendations for support plans
Work collaboratively with parents, schools, and health professionals
Beyond one-off assessments, we offer ongoing support:
Staff training and CPD for teachers and SENCOs
Education timelines are demanding. When you need an EP urgently:
We source available EPs nationwide within 24–48 hours
Flexible scheduling that fits your timetable
Your dedicated Client Manager keeps you updated every step

faqs.question: What's the difference between Psychology Direct and instructing an EP directly?
faqs.answer: You get the same independent expert. Psychology Direct handles the admin — matching, scheduling, invoicing, quality assurance. The EP retains full clinical independence. You save time; the EP focuses on assessment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you find an EP for an assessment?
faqs.answer: Our UK-wide network means we typically supply CVs and quotes within 48 hours. Appointments usually follow within 2–3 weeks. For urgent cases, we often move faster.

faqs.question: Are your EPs registered and DBS checked?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every EP is HCPC-registered and enhanced DBS checked. They're on the DBS update service and hold professional indemnity insurance. Many also hold BPS and AEP membership.

faqs.question: Do you help with EHCP assessments?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specialise in statutory EHCP pathway support from initial assessment through to report delivery. We understand LA timelines and statutory requirements. Our reports meet all SEND Code of Practice standards.

faqs.question: What if we need ongoing support, not just a one-off assessment?
faqs.answer: We offer flexibility. Schools and LAs can commission single assessments or establish longer-term arrangements with dedicated EP allocation. No rigid contracts. You choose what suits you.

faqs.question: How much does an assessment cost?
faqs.answer: Fees vary by assessment type, complexity, and location. We always provide a fixed quote upfront with no hidden costs. Volume discounts available for education contracts.

faqs.question: Will a local authority accept reports from your EPs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our EPs are HCPC-registered and meet LA statutory requirements. We can tailor reports to your LA's template if needed. Early conversation helps ensure alignment.

faqs.question: Can you handle complex cases involving multiple agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our Client Managers coordinate multi-agency cases, liaising with health, social care, and other professionals. We manage logistics so you focus on the child's needs.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the quality of EP reports?
faqs.answer: All reports are 100% proofread and quality-checked against the assessment brief. Your dedicated Client Manager oversees the process for clarity and actionable recommendations.

faqs.question: What happens if a child needs a different type of support after assessment?
faqs.answer: Your EP can recommend further assessment, intervention, or consultancy. We can provide ongoing support or signpost to specialist services based on the child's needs.

blocks.heading: Find the Right Educational Psychologist
blocks.bodyText: Schools need urgent EHCP assessments. LAs face backlogs. Trusts need consistent EP support. Whatever your challenge, we can help. Let's find the right EP for you.
